dsl_rule.translation_notes: Two-candle pattern: First candle is a tall white body (prev_open < prev_close with large body relative to ATR). Second candle opens below the middle of the first candle's body (open < pivot, where pivot approximates the midpoint) and closes at or below that middle (close <= pivot). Pattern targets uptrend peaks. Exit on reversal above prior high. No volume data specified by author, so volume conditions omitted.

source_rule_text: Below the Stomach: A two-candle pattern appearing at the peak of an uptrend, consisting of a tall white candle followed by a second candle that opens below the middle of the white candle's body and closes at or below the middle.
